description: Longer or mildly social challenges requiring some preparation, focus, or physical effort.

challenges.title: Brisk Walk Fifteen
challenges.prompt: Take a 15-minute walk on a familiar safe route at a pace where you can still speak in sentences.

challenges.title: Two-Round Basics
challenges.prompt: After warming up, do two rounds of 8 chair squats, 8 wall push-ups, and 20 seconds of marching; rest as needed.

challenges.title: Three-Song Dance Set
challenges.prompt: Dance for three songs in a clear space, taking a break whenever needed.

challenges.title: Stair or Step Five
challenges.prompt: Use a safe staircase with a handrail or a low stable step for five easy minutes; do not race.

challenges.title: Core Control Trio
challenges.prompt: Do three rounds of a 15-second wall plank or countertop plank with comfortable rest.

challenges.title: Walk-and-Notice
challenges.prompt: Walk for 12 minutes and mentally note five sounds and five colors without using your phone while moving.

challenges.title: Mobility Flow Ten
challenges.prompt: Follow ten minutes of gentle, beginner-friendly mobility and never stretch into pain.

challenges.title: Shadowbox Basics
challenges.prompt: Do four 30-second rounds of light shadowboxing with open space and no contact, resting between rounds.

challenges.title: Slow Squat Ladder
challenges.prompt: Complete 2, 4, 6, 8, then 10 supported chair squats; stop early if form changes or pain appears.

challenges.title: Balloon Keep-Up
challenges.prompt: Keep a balloon off the floor for two minutes in a clear indoor space; avoid lights, fans, and breakables.

challenges.title: One-Minute Character
challenges.prompt: Perform a one-minute original character for a friend who agrees to watch.

challenges.title: Commercial for a Spoon
challenges.prompt: Create and perform a 30-second overdramatic commercial for an ordinary safe object.

challenges.title: Clean Meme Caption Set
challenges.prompt: Write five original family-friendly captions for one photo you own.

challenges.title: Mini Comic Four
challenges.prompt: Draw a four-panel comic with a beginning, surprise, and ending.

challenges.title: Found-Object Sculpture
challenges.prompt: Arrange five objects you own into temporary art, photograph it, then put everything back.

challenges.title: One-Page Mystery
challenges.prompt: Write a one-page mystery in which the missing item is something silly.

challenges.title: Paper Costume Detail
challenges.prompt: Create one wearable costume accessory from paper and tape; keep vision and movement unobstructed.

challenges.title: Kitchen Rhythm
challenges.prompt: Make a 30-second rhythm using safe, unbreakable kitchen items without striking hard or disturbing others.

challenges.title: Photo Theme Ten
challenges.prompt: Take ten original photos around one theme without including people or private details unless they consent.

challenges.title: Recreate an Album Pose
challenges.prompt: Recreate the pose and composition of an album cover using your own props; do not copy or post artwork without permission.

challenges.title: Call Someone You Miss
challenges.prompt: Call a friend or relative who is usually happy to hear from you and have a real five-minute conversation.

challenges.title: Invite a Friend Along
challenges.prompt: Invite someone you know to join a walk, study session, or game; accept no or no response without pressure.

challenges.title: Ask Three Curious Questions
challenges.prompt: In a normal conversation, ask someone three respectful questions and listen without interrupting.

challenges.title: Voice-Message Appreciation
challenges.prompt: Send a 20-second appreciation voice message to someone comfortable receiving voice messages.

challenges.title: Reconnect Gently
challenges.prompt: Message someone you already know with a simple no-pressure check-in; do not repeatedly message if they do not respond.

challenges.title: Family Story Request
challenges.prompt: Ask a relative or trusted adult to tell you a short story from their childhood if they want to share.

challenges.title: Teach a Tiny Skill
challenges.prompt: Teach a willing friend one small skill you know in under ten minutes.

challenges.title: Offline Game Round
challenges.prompt: Play one round of a board, card, or word game with willing participants.

challenges.title: Compliment Chain Three
challenges.prompt: Give three different people you know sincere, non-appearance-based compliments.

challenges.title: Helpful Chore Surprise
challenges.prompt: Complete one ordinary household chore you are allowed to do before being asked.

challenges.title: Litter Loop
challenges.prompt: With gloves or a grabber, collect ordinary litter for ten minutes in a safe public area; never handle hazardous objects.

challenges.title: Donation Sort Ten
challenges.prompt: Choose ten clean items you own that you genuinely no longer need and set them aside for an appropriate donation site.

challenges.title: Positive Review
challenges.prompt: Write an honest, specific positive review for a local place or creator you have actually used.

challenges.title: Thank a Worker
challenges.prompt: Politely thank a teacher, coach, coworker, or service worker for something specific without delaying their work.

challenges.title: Learn Ten Signs
challenges.prompt: Learn and practice ten basic signs from a reputable sign-language source appropriate to your region.

challenges.title: Origami Without Restarting
challenges.prompt: Complete one beginner origami model, correcting mistakes without throwing the paper away.

challenges.title: Juggle Scarf Start
challenges.prompt: Practice juggling two lightweight scarves for ten minutes in a clear space.

challenges.title: Map Memory
challenges.prompt: Study a simple map of a familiar area for two minutes, hide it, and redraw the main landmarks from memory.

challenges.title: Keyboard Shortcut Five
challenges.prompt: Learn and correctly use five keyboard shortcuts for an app you already use.

challenges.title: Recipe Reading Challenge
challenges.prompt: Choose a simple recipe and explain every step before cooking anything; get kitchen permission first.

challenges.title: One-Hand Paper Toss
challenges.prompt: From a safe distance, land five paper balls in a recycling bin; retrieve every miss.

challenges.title: Speed Puzzle Twenty
challenges.prompt: Work on an age-appropriate jigsaw or logic puzzle for twenty focused minutes.

challenges.title: Nature Bingo Nine
challenges.prompt: Create a 3-by-3 list of common outdoor sights and safely spot a row without leaving public paths.

challenges.title: Sunset Color Study
challenges.prompt: From a legal, safe viewing place, record five color changes near sunset; never stare at the sun.

challenges.title: Neighborhood Shape Hunt
challenges.prompt: On a familiar public route, photograph circles, squares, and triangles without capturing private information.

challenges.title: Quiet Park Sit
challenges.prompt: Sit in a legal public outdoor place for ten minutes, respect others, and list what you noticed.

challenges.title: Screen-Free Meal
challenges.prompt: Eat one normal meal without a phone or other screen; follow your usual dietary needs.

challenges.title: Inbox Ten
challenges.prompt: Process ten non-sensitive emails or notifications by replying, filing, or deleting only what you recognize.

challenges.title: Drawer Reset
challenges.prompt: Organize one drawer containing only your belongings; keep important documents and medications untouched.

challenges.title: Tomorrow Top Three
challenges.prompt: Choose three realistic priorities for tomorrow and put them in order.
